assertionResults.title: Event author pubkey is deterministic per share (derived from share secret)

steps.action: Seed runtime with keyset share #1 and publish backup via Publish modal
steps.expected: Published event kind=10000 with pubkey matching share-derived author

steps.action: Publish second time from same share
steps.observed: Second event id 72a567... retained same pubkey=0afc85bc...

steps.action: Reseed same keyset with share #2 and publish
steps.expected: Different share yields different author pubkey
steps.observed: Share #2 publish event id 07164c... pubkey=cabfa285c1f13535ac89de2958b508d09f46506cc75d20a0709e8a6536a436ac (different from share #1)

evidence.consoleErrors: Known pre-existing React nested-button warning in PeersPanel (tracked in AGENTS.md); no new publish-flow-specific console exceptions.
evidence.network: Observer REQ/EVENT over ws://127.0.0.1:8194 captured kind=10000 event(s) for share-derived author

assertionResults.title: Duplicate publish replaces prior backup event

steps.action: Publish twice from same share and query relay with filter {kinds:[10000], authors:[sharePubkey]}
steps.expected: Relay returns exactly one event (newer replaceable winner)

evidence.network: Post-second-publish REQ/EOSE response from local relay included both events instead of single replaceable winner

assertionResults.issues: Local bifrost-devtools relay (ws://127.0.0.1:8194) retained both revisions for kind 10000 + author, preventing contract-level replaceable semantic validation in this deterministic environment.

assertionResults.title: Publish fails cleanly when no relays configured or all offline

steps.action: Attempt publish from modal with valid password/confirm
steps.expected: Inline error shown, no success state, failure captured in runtime event log
steps.observed: Inline error 'No relays available to publish to.' shown and success state absent, but runtimeEventLog scan had no publish/no-relay entry

evidence.network: No outbound publish success path while relay offline; modal stayed in error state

assertionResults.issues: Runtime event log did not capture a no-relay publish failure record, so assertion criterion requiring event-log capture was not met.

steps.action: Open Publish modal and enter Password=Password123!, Confirm=Password123?
steps.expected: Mismatch blocks publish with inline 'Passwords do not match.' and disabled/rejected CTA
steps.observed: Inline mismatch error rendered, publish button remained disabled, and no success state appeared

evidence.network: No publish frame dispatched while mismatch present

steps.observed: data-strength=1; label=weak; only first segment filled
data-strength=2; label=medium; first two segments filled
data-strength=3; label=strong; all three segments filled and submit enabled when confirm matched

assertionResults.title: Replaceable-event race: only newer backup persists

steps.action: Run rapid back-to-back publishes from same share and compare created_at + relay query results
steps.expected: Relay query returns only newer winner; UI most-recent publish reflects winner
steps.observed: created_at advanced monotonically (1776895664 -> 1776895685) and app state lastBackupPublishedAt updated to newer value, but relay query still returned both events

evidence.network: Post-race REQ/EOSE from local relay returned 2 events for same author/kind instead of single replaceable winner

assertionResults.issues: Validation blocked by local relay replaceable-event behavior in deterministic ws://127.0.0.1:8194 environment.

frictions.description: Dashboard consistently emits known nested <button> hydration warning from PeersPanel, adding noisy console errors during backup-flow checks.
frictions.resolution: Treated as pre-existing tracked issue per AGENTS.md; excluded from publish assertion pass/fail decisions.

blockers.description: Local bifrost-devtools relay returned multiple kind=10000 events for same author after duplicate/race publish, preventing strict replaceable-single-winner verification.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Re-queried relay after delay; response still contained both event IDs

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-BACKUP-004, 024, 025), 1 failed (VAL-BACKUP-007), 2 blocked by local relay replaceable-event behavior (VAL-BACKUP-006, VAL-BACKUP-031).
